introSection: Scamper was a wooden wild mouse roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA then later at Goldrush Junction (now known as Dollywood) in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was relocated to Goldrush Junction from Cedar Point in 1970.

fullText:
Scamper was a wooden wild mouse roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA then later at Goldrush Junction (now known as Dollywood) in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA.

The ride was relocated to Goldrush Junction from Cedar Point in 1970.
